message: Yes. I realized that I’m not sure how I will manage work and do well in my classes.
Serving. Probably about 15 hours per week, mainly weekends.
What did you learn from the workshop?

I think I will have to use my time wisely.  They said to expect to study and work on assignments for at least 2-3 hours for every class. If I take 5 classes per term, that means a minimum of 10-15 hours per week on studying plus the 15 hours of class time.
It is.  Plus, I’m going to take lots of science courses and they have labs in addition to lecture time.  I’m stressed already and I haven’t started.
Yikes, that’s like a full-time job.
It sure is.  But they said that many students don’t dedicate enough time to studying outside of class time. Also, they don’t make good use of their time while studying.

options.text: I’ve never really had to study in high school, so I’m not too worried about postsecondary.
I’ve had to spend a lot of time studying in high school just to keep up.
I usually do everything last minute and still end up doing okay.
